name: apple-photos
description: Query and export from the macOS Apple Photos library via osxphotos - search by date/album/keyword/person, list albums and folders, fetch metadata, and export originals or edited photos (macOS only).

interface.shortDescription: Query, inspect, and export from the macOS Apple Photos library.
interface.longDescription: A macOS-only Apple Photos connector for Codex that uses the apple-photos-mcp server (backed by osxphotos) to query the Photos library by date, album, keyword, person, or favorite/hidden flags; list albums, folders, keywords, and persons; fetch full photo metadata; and export originals or edited versions to a directory. Read-only against the library, with diagnostics support.
defaultPrompt: Find all my photos from our trip to Spain in 2023.
How many photos do I have and what are my top keywords?
Export my favorite sunset photos to ~/Desktop/sunsets.
